phase: consumed-development one-second taker-flow execution-timing viability pilot
single_registered_change: Keep the frozen Round 41 June 2024 out-of-sample primary side proposals unchanged and add a shared one-second taker-flow hurdle model that may veto the proposal or choose a 0, 5, 15, or 30 second market-entry delay.

predecessor_evidence.round_36_finding: BTCUSDT L1 imbalance had repeatable five-second direction AUC 0.607257 but at most 0.458363 gross bps; every frozen 12 bps taker replay remained negative. Short-horizon microstructure is therefore an execution input, not standalone alpha evidence.
predecessor_evidence.round_41_finding: Six-month prequential meta evaluation AUC was 0.572530 to 0.598146, but the two selected months reversed from positive calibration to negative evaluation. The 466 selected actions averaged -0.677377 net bps at the frozen 12 bps charge.
predecessor_evidence.decision: Do not add another minute-bar architecture or weaken costs. Test whether causal one-second trade flow improves the execution of an unchanged slower proposal before acquiring a much larger second-level corpus.

source_contract.archive_source: checksum-verified Binance public daily USD-M aggTrades files
source_contract.second_bar_derivation: One-second OHLCV, quote volume, trade count, taker-buy base volume, and taker-buy quote volume aggregated from real exchange aggTrades; empty seconds forward-fill only price and retain zero flow.
known_limitations: The pilot has seven contiguous days and cannot establish long-run profitability, regime coverage, or portfolio risk.
Historical Level-2 depth and queue state are unavailable, so passive fill simulation is prohibited.
The fixed cost charges represent fee, spread, latency, and adverse-slippage stress; they are not claimed as exact fills for every second.

frozen_primary_proposal.proposal_side: long when calibrated p_long is greater than p_short; otherwise short

causal_second_flow_features.feature_timestamp: Every feature ends at entry_time minus one second; the entry second and every later second are excluded.
cross_asset_features: same six-window return, volatility, signed-flow, and intensity summaries for BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT, and SOLUSDT
causal_second_flow_features.side_canonicalization: Directional return and flow features are multiplied by proposal side so one shared model learns favorable versus adverse state.

delay_option_and_outcome_contract.entry_price: real one-second candle open at frozen baseline entry time plus selected delay
delay_option_and_outcome_contract.exit_price: real one-second candle open exactly 1800 seconds after the delayed entry
delay_option_and_outcome_contract.funding_cash_flow: exact settled funding when a settlement falls strictly inside the holding window; expected to be rare at 30 minutes
delay_option_and_outcome_contract.overlapping_label_weighting: average uniqueness by symbol and holding interval, divided equally across the four delay rows from one proposal

overlay_model.architecture: one shared option-conditional LightGBM hurdle stack across symbols and proposal sides

heads.name: positive_net_probability
heads.label: one when proposal-side delayed utility is above zero after the 12 bps charge

heads.name: robust_expected_net_utility
heads.label: proposal-side net utility bps after the 12 bps charge

heads.name: lower_quartile_net_utility
heads.label: proposal-side net utility bps after the 12 bps charge

overlay_model.option_selection: Among delay options passing the frozen probability, expected-utility, and lower-tail thresholds, choose highest predicted expected utility; stable ties choose the shortest delay. If no option passes, veto.

walk_forward_contract.causality_reason: At the later fold date, all prior 30-minute outcomes are settled and observable.
walk_forward_contract.threshold_selected_on: the complete immediately preceding calibration day only

comparators.immediate_execution: Every frozen primary proposal enters at delay zero under the same overlap, capacity, funding, and cost accounting.
comparators.veto_only: Apply the selected overlay eligibility threshold but force delay zero, isolating filtering from timing.
comparators.timing_overlay: Apply both overlay eligibility and selected delay.
comparators.oracle_best_delay: Post-outcome diagnostic upper bound only; prohibited from selection, model input, gate satisfaction, or any profitability claim.

pilot_gate.meaning: Passing authorizes only a new frozen multimonth second-level data-acquisition and confirmation experiment.

ai_contract.reason: An 8B language model cannot safely sit in a 5 to 30 second execution loop, and two evaluation days cannot support an AI-uplift claim. AI remains an asynchronous regime and risk-veto candidate only after the ML overlay passes and multimonth data are frozen.
ai_contract.future_ai_candidate: DianJin/DianJin-R1-7B or a better measured finance model available at the later frozen design date
ai_contract.future_ai_authority: veto or cooldown only; never create, reverse, resize, or delay an action outside ML options

required_outputs: hash-bound source certificate and execution binding
per-symbol archive and one-second stream identities
proposal counts and exclusions by role and symbol
causal feature identity and matrix memory evidence
six OpenCL model artifacts with exact reload checks
classification, robust-regression, and lower-quantile diagnostics by role
all 54 threshold traces including zero-action cells
immediate, veto-only, timing-overlay, and oracle diagnostic replays
base and 16 bps stress economics by fold and symbol
delay-choice distribution, overlap rejections, and capacity rejections
day-block bootstrap interval and pilot-gate reasons
runtime, peak working set, and backend evidence
explicit false authority, leverage, portfolio, ROI, drawdown, profitability, and AI-uplift claims

research_basis.title: The Price Impact of Order Book Events
research_basis.use: Supports treating short-horizon order-flow imbalance as a price-impact and execution-state variable; its equity results do not validate this Binance pilot.

research_basis.title: Incorporating Order-Flow into Optimal Execution
research_basis.use: Supports adjusting execution timing to prevailing expected order flow rather than treating the short signal as standalone alpha.

research_basis.title: Price predictability in limit order book with deep learning model
research_basis.use: Supports separating opportunity from direction and identifies volume imbalance as more useful for direction than price history alone.

research_basis.title: Explainable Patterns in Cryptocurrency Microstructure
research_basis.use: Supports cross-asset stationary trade and order-book representations with conservative execution tests; its CatBoost and Level-2 results are not imported.

research_basis.title: Deep Limit Order Book Forecasting
research_basis.use: Warns that high forecast accuracy need not produce actionable transactions, so economic and execution gates remain primary.

research_basis.title: The Probability of Backtest Overfitting
research_basis.use: Requires explicit trial accounting and denies promotion from this short, repeatedly consumed pilot.

research_basis.title: Binance public trade data guidance
research_basis.use: Documents daily and monthly public trades and aggTrades archives plus real-time aggregate trade streams.

explicit_non_claims: The seven-day source is not multi-year backtesting.
A positive pilot would not prove a market edge, profitability, ROI, drawdown, execution quality, or readiness for testnet or live trading.
No spread, depth, queue, passive fill, leverage, capital allocation, or liquidation result is produced.
No AI inference or AI-uplift result is produced.
A failed pilot rejects this exact overlay and does not justify lowering the cost or uncertainty gates.
